patch.value: pm schema list / pm schema show: inspect registered custom and built-in types
After pm schema add-type there is no CLI to confirm registered types or inspect the merged runtime registry; agents must read schema/types.json directly.
pm schema list outputs built-in+custom (toon+json {builtin,custom}); pm schema show <Name> shows full definition (folder/aliases/default_status/policies); schema-command tests; MCP schema action.
After pm schema add-type there is no CLI to confirm registered types or inspect the merged runtime registry; agents must read schema/types.json directly.

author: codex-main
message: Combining schema inspection with type preset bootstrap work for one customization-focused PR; duplicate check reused pm-mt7k story and pm-vhd9 story instead of creating new items.

value.author: codex-sdk-explorer
value.text: Explorer finding 2026-06-03: SDK/schema inspection confirms this is the canonical item for schema list/show. Public primitives today: @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk exports defineExtension, ExtensionApi, SchemaItemTypeDefinition/SchemaFieldDefinition/SchemaMigrationDefinition, ExtensionRegistrationRegistry, getContracts/getWorkspaceContracts; extensions can call api.registerItemTypes/registerItemFields/registerMigration with schema capability. Runtime type registry merges built-ins + settings/schema/types.json + extension registerItemTypes, but current pm schema CLI/MCP/contracts expose only add-type. Combined PR should make list/show source-aware (builtin, configured file/settings, extension with layer/name), update CLI/MCP/contracts/completion/docs/tests, and include extension-registered type coverage so package authors can verify activation before create.

value.note: command barrel exports schema inspection helpers
schema list/show implementation and compact renderers

value.command: node scripts/run-tests.mjs test -- tests/unit/schema-command.spec.ts tests/unit/contracts-command.spec.ts tests/unit/completion-command.spec.ts tests/unit/sdk-index.spec.ts

value.author: codex-main
value.text: Evidence: Implemented pm schema list/show with compact human output and JSON builtin/custom/extension groups, full show definitions, extension provenance for extension-owned types, CLI/MCP/SDK contracts/completion coverage, and docs. Verification passed: pnpm build; linked pm test --run for schema/contracts/completion/sdk tests; temp dogfood init --type-preset research + schema list/show + create Experiment + health; pnpm quality:docs-skills; pnpm quality:static; pnpm changelog:pm:check using pm-changelog 2026.6.2 unchanged; pm health --check-only --summary ok; node scripts/run-tests.mjs coverage 2120 tests 100%. pm validate history drift ok; resolution warnings are pre-existing closed-item metadata warnings.

patch.value: Delivered schema list/show inspection with CLI, MCP, SDK contracts, completion, docs, tests, temp dogfood, and coverage evidence.
Implemented schema list/show across CLI, MCP, SDK contracts, completion, docs, and tests.
Agents can inspect built-in, custom, and extension item types without reading schema files.
pm schema list/show works in focused tests and temp dogfood; coverage and quality gates pass.
